 {"id":"bd-1w9zv","title":"[BUG] OnceCell get_or_try_init uses recursion instead of loop on cancelled init","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-03T23:15:25.877769345Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T23:16:26.911970826Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T23:16:26.911897440Z","close_reason":"Already fixed: get_or_try_init already uses loop pattern with Option<F> + CAS retry, not recursion. The fix was part of commit eb15cc7.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1wen4","title":"[SPORK][Lab][Harness] Crashpack Attachment + Linking","description":"When failures occur, attach crash pack metadata to the report:
- paths/IDs
- fingerprints
- replay instructions","acceptance_criteria":"Acceptance:
- Schema/API is specified and stable.
- Deterministic across seeds.
- Used by at least one scenario test.","notes":"Implemented crashpack attachment/linking contract in harness reports.

Code:
- src/lab/runtime.rs:
  - Added CrashpackLink API (path/id/fingerprint/replay) and SporkHarnessReport::crashpack_link().
  - Added top-level crashpack field in SporkHarnessReport::to_json().
  - Bumped SporkHarnessReport::SCHEMA_VERSION to 3 and documented v3 in schema history.
  - Existing auto-crashpack path now surfaces deterministic replay linkage metadata.
  - Expanded contract tests to assert crashpack linkage behavior and null on passing runs.
- tests/lab_harness_report_schema.rs:
  - Schema assertions now validate crashpack linkage fields (path, id, fingerprint, replay.command_line) and use SCHEMA_VERSION constant.
- tests/spork_crashpack_attachment.rs (new):
  - Scenario-runner integration test verifies deterministic crashpack linkage across repeated runs and validates path/id/fingerprint/replay alignment.

Validation:
- PASS: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/asupersync-scarlet cargo check --lib
- PASS: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/asupersync-scarlet cargo test --test lab_harness_report_schema --test spork_crashpack_attachment -- --nocapture
- PASS: rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/lab/runtime.rs tests/lab_harness_report_schema.rs tests/spork_crashpack_attachment.rs
- Repo-wide gates currently blocked by unrelated shared-tree failures (e.g. tests/spork_ordering_conformance.rs, tests/sharding_correctness.rs, tests/distributed_spawn.rs; plus existing fmt/clippy drift in other files).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ScarletCave","created_at":"2026-02-06T03:23:59.959839630Z","created_by":"FuchsiaRiver","updated_at":"2026-02-08T07:18:43.300802255Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T07:18:43.300672564Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["crash","lab","spork"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1wen4","depends_on_id":"bd-39e7d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T03:24:00.000787938Z","created_by":"FuchsiaRiver"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wen4","depends_on_id":"bd-8dxy1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T03:23:59.978602168Z","created_by":"FuchsiaRiver"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1wf6y","title":"[audit] Combinator cancel/drain correctness: hedge + quorum","description":"Random audit slice per AGENTS.md: deeply trace combinator implementations (hedge/quorum) for cancel-correctness and structured-concurrency invariants (losers drained, no obligation leaks, region close => quiescence). Fix any obvious bugs and add deterministic tests.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-09T17:07:30.361423813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T17:07:37.546479602Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1wgek","title":"[BUG] Local cancel can leave duplicate in local_ready","description":"In three_lane local task routing, cancel paths (inject_cancel / ThreeLaneLocalCancelWaker / schedule_cancel_on_current_local) move tasks to PriorityScheduler cancel lane but do not remove any existing entry in local_ready. If the task was already queued in local_ready, it can be polled again without a wake (extra poll, possible invariant violation). Consider removing from local_ready when promoting to cancel or deduping local_ready.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"SunnyCat","created_at":"2026-02-03T21:00:48.014098498Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T03:06:14.517524594Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T03:06:14.517450236Z","close_reason":"Already fixed: all 3 local cancel paths (inject_cancel, schedule_cancel_on_current_local, ThreeLaneLocalCancelWaker::schedule) call remove_from_local_ready before promoting to cancel lane. Test: test_local_cancel_removes_from_local_ready validates the fix.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1wxo","title":"QUIC/HTTP3 interop tests","description":"Goal: QUIC/HTTP3 conformance and interop tests (quinn/h3/lsquic) with comprehensive unit tests where applicable, plus E2E scripts that log detailed traces and artifacts for CI.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:57:28.708518361Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T06:50:13.506357532Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T06:50:13.506282582Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["quic","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1wxo","depends_on_id":"bd-13j1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:02:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wxo","depends_on_id":"bd-2lqc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:02:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wxo","depends_on_id":"bd-2qgg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:02:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wxo","depends_on_id":"bd-biay","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:02:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
